name: Eidetic OS Built-in Skills
description: The skills that ship with Eidetic OS — vault management, session capture, email reports, trading research, and job-search automation.

skills.name: afternoon-job-tracker-update
skills.description: Afternoon email scan for job-application updates — catches later emails and updates the tracker spreadsheet.
skills.author: Eidetic OS

skills.name: afternoon-session-capture
skills.description: Afternoon capture of the day's Cowork chat transcripts into the vault as session-log notes.
skills.author: Eidetic OS

skills.name: atlas-daily-report-email
skills.description: Daily morning report email — job-search status, system health, and action items.
skills.author: Eidetic OS

skills.name: daily-job-tracker-update
skills.description: Morning email scan for job-application updates — new applications, rejections, interviews, shortlists — and update a tracker spreadsheet.
skills.author: Eidetic OS

skills.name: daily-session-capture
skills.description: Nightly capture of the day's Cowork chat transcripts into the vault as session-log notes.
skills.author: Eidetic OS

skills.name: daily-trading-report
skills.description: Daily multi-agent market research — runs analyst agents on a watchlist via a local LLM, emails a research report.
skills.author: Eidetic OS

skills.name: friday-it-newsletter
skills.description: Weekly IT news newsletter — AI, cloud, M365, cybersecurity, enterprise tech — emailed each Friday morning.
skills.author: Eidetic OS

skills.name: generate-vault-report-doc
skills.description: Document creation — compile a set of vault notes on a topic into a polished, formatted Word (.docx) or PDF report.
skills.author: Eidetic OS

skills.name: inbox-triage-digest
skills.description: Inbox triage digest — scan unread/important mail since the last run, summarise and categorise it, and email a concise digest.
skills.author: Eidetic OS

skills.name: morning-session-capture
skills.description: Morning capture of overnight and early-morning Cowork chat transcripts into the vault as session-log notes.
skills.author: Eidetic OS

skills.name: nightly-obsidian-index
skills.description: Nightly vault index + morning briefing of what changed in your markdown vault.
skills.author: Eidetic OS

skills.name: nightly-rag-incremental
skills.description: Incremental RAG embed of new/changed vault notes using a local embeddings endpoint.
skills.author: Eidetic OS

skills.name: spreadsheet-analysis
skills.description: Open a spreadsheet, compute summary statistics and trends, flag anomalies, and write a short findings note.
skills.author: Eidetic OS

skills.name: topic-research-brief
skills.description: Multi-round web research on a topic, synthesised into a cited brief and saved as a structured vault note.
skills.author: Eidetic OS

skills.name: vault-lint-report
skills.description: Vault health check — finds orphan notes, dead wikilinks, stale claims, and frontmatter gaps, then writes a lint report note.
skills.author: Eidetic OS

skills.name: weekly-digest-report
skills.description: Weekly vault digest — new notes, decisions, and research from the past 7 days, compiled and emailed as an HTML report.
skills.author: Eidetic OS

skills.name: weekly-rag-full-reembed
skills.description: Weekly full re-embed of all vault notes into the RAG vector store.
skills.author: Eidetic OS

skills.name: weekly-system-health-check
skills.description: Weekly full system health check — tests all Eidetic OS subsystems and emails a report.
skills.author: Eidetic OS
